hooks.command: bash -c 'MEMORY_SRC=$(pwd)/.claude-memory && MEMORY_DST=$HOME/.claude/projects/$(pwd | sed "s|[/.]|-|g")/memory && mkdir -p "$MEMORY_SRC" "$(dirname "$MEMORY_DST")" && [ -d "$MEMORY_DST" ] && [ ! -L "$MEMORY_DST" ] && cp -rn "$MEMORY_DST"/* "$MEMORY_SRC/" 2>/dev/null; rm -rf "$MEMORY_DST" && ln -sf "$MEMORY_SRC" "$MEMORY_DST" || true'
bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat) && SUBJECT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".task.subject // empty") && [ -n "$SUBJECT" ] && command -v bd >/dev/null 2>&1 && bd create "$SUBJECT" -t task -p 2 2>/dev/null || true'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat) && SUBJECT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".task.subject // empty") && [ -n "$SUBJECT" ] && command -v bd >/dev/null 2>&1 && ISSUE_ID=$(bd search "$SUBJECT" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | awk "{print \$1}") && [ -n "$ISSUE_ID" ] && bd close "$ISSUE_ID" -r "completed" 2>/dev/null || true'
bash -c 'command -v bd >/dev/null 2>&1 && bd dolt stop 2>/dev/null || true'
